title: Faculty Development Program by Art of Living 1st Batch
content: Event Date: 9th - 12th July 2024 The Faculty Development Program, organized under the auspices of the "Art of Living" organization, concluded at Galgotias University. In this four-days Faculty Development Program organized by the "Art of Living," the faculty members of Galgotias University were meticulously instructed on internationally acclaimed techniques such as Sudarshan Kriya . This included breathing techniques, meditation, yoga, and practical knowledge for daily life & how the faculty can built positive relationships with students, provide timely and create a supportive environment. There was also an extensive discussion on the great culture of India and the grand traditions of yoga. During the conclusion of the program, when participants were asked about their experience with the "Art of Living," they shared that the wonderful experiences they had over the past four days were unique and extraordinary. They further remarked on a significant point that it is a bitter truth that the "Art of Living" encompasses a remarkable power to bring positive thoughts into anyone's life. Therefore, "Art of Living" is a great organization that, while being the custodian of Indian culture, is also the mother of great traditions that work for the welfare of people. On this occasion, Dr. Dhruv Galgotia, CEO of Galgotias University, said that "Art of Living" teaches us about the art of living in real world. In today's fast-paced life, when we are going through stress, Art of Living shows us the way to relieve stress through yoga and basic changes in lifestyle. Enjoying life while staying happy amidst daily stress and tension is what Art of Living is all about. It is a technique through which one learns the art of bringing happiness and joy into life by eliminating stress and worries. Art of Living is a great discipline of the great practices in Indian culture. From the "Art of Living," Mr. Akhilesh Parmanu (Senior Faculty), Dr. Sadhana, Savita Sharma, Rajesh Mathur, Niti Srivastava, and Shruti made significant contributions to all the sessions of the Faculty Development Program. Mentor Name – Dr Nitin Gaur Department Name – SCSE,SCAT,SOLE ,School of Education and School of Basic Sciences
